canvas_intro_1.headline: Welcome to your King’s Canvas
canvas_intro_1.body: This is your space to map intentions, break them into steps, and connect those steps to opportunities that can move you forward.

canvas_intro_2.headline: Intentions and steps
canvas_intro_2.body: You start with intentions like "Get lab experience" or "Explore digital law". Then you break them into concrete steps that sit in the time buckets on your Canvas.

canvas_intro_3.headline: Buckets and time horizons
canvas_intro_3.body: Steps sit in buckets such as Do now, Do later, Before I graduate and After I graduate, so you can see what needs your attention now and what can wait.

persona_intro.headline: Pick the student profile that fits you
persona_intro.body: Your student profile helps shape the suggestions you see. You can change it at any time using this menu.

first_intention.headline: Start with something you want to work towards
first_intention.body: Add an intention like "Get lab experience" or "Explore digital law". We will help you break it into concrete steps.

steps_and_suggestions.headline: We are generating steps for this intention
steps_and_suggestions.body: You will see suggested steps appear here. You can accept, edit, or reject them, and you can always add your own steps as well.

manual_add_step.headline: You can always add your own steps
manual_add_step.body: If our suggestions miss something important, use this control to add your own step to this intention.

opportunities_intro.headline: Here are ways to move this step forward
opportunities_intro.body: These are simulated King's Edge style and independent opportunities that match this step. You can scan them for ideas and adapt them to your situation.

opportunities_shuffle.headline: Shuffle to see different ideas
opportunities_shuffle.body: If these suggestions do not feel quite right, you can shuffle to see another set of opportunities for this step.

opportunities_autogenerating.headline: We are generating opportunities for this step
opportunities_autogenerating.body: For this step we are now looking for possible opportunities you could explore. You can close this tip and carry on while that loads.

delete_steps_and_intentions.headline: You can remove steps or intentions
delete_steps_and_intentions.body: If a step or intention is no longer useful, you can delete it. Use the delete controls or drag items to the bin so your Canvas stays focused.
